allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('public/treemap_data.json','utf-8'\)\); const kr=d.stocks.filter\(s=>s.m==='KR'\); console.log\('KR stocks:', kr.map\(s=>s.t+' '+s.n\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Total:', d.stocks.length, '/ KR:', kr.length\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('yahoo-finance2'\).default; console.log\(typeof m, m.constructor?.name, Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,5\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./public/data/treemap.json', {assert:{type:'json'}}\).then\(m => console.log\('전체 종목 수:', m.default.stocks?.length, '\\n티커 목록:', m.default.stocks?.map\(s=>s.t\).join\(', '\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/polaris_nav_data.json'\); const tickers=d.stocks?.map\(s=>s.t\); console.log\('전체 종목 수:', tickers?.length\); console.log\(tickers?.join\(', '\)\)")
